race.description: Sportsbet Racing Cash Out F&M Hcp (56)
race.comment: MONDELLO (3) returned over 1200m at Strathalbyn and just found one better on the day. Fitter and looks ideally placed in this moderate line-up. Worth following up. TAHNEE TERRITORY (4) resumes and worth noting maiden win was the last time fresh from a spell. Drawn for a soft run and should be winding up strongly. MISS SGHIRRIPA (2) returned from a long break with an eye-catching third. Second-up winner last time in and will give a huge sight here. LADY MEMPHIS (1) doesn't win out of turn but is best at this trip and has placed only try here. Drawn for a soft run and will be hard to hold out. JUST A JEWEL (8) is mixing form but saves best for here and can improve sharply.
